clues.clue: Largely animated by Marc Davis, this 1959 villainess transforms into a dragon for the climax.
Voiced by Pat Carroll, this 1989 antagonist was visually modeled on the drag performer Divine.
This 1996 Disney judge sings the guilt-and-lust confession 'Hellfire.'
This 'Shadow Man' of 2009's bayou bargains with sinister voodoo spirits he calls his 'friends.'
Voiced by Vincent Price, this rat criminal mastermind plots against the Crown in a 1986 film.
This 2011 meme animation pairs a feline with a Pop-Tart torso and a rainbow trail.
A 2007 humor site popularized this genre of feline photos captioned in deliberately broken English.
The 2013 'Doge' meme, later a cryptocurrency mascot, features this Japanese dog breed.
This perpetually frowning internet-celebrity feline's real name was Tardar Sauce.
Filmed in 1984 but uploaded in 2007 to 'play off' people, this piano-pawing tabby became an early viral hit.
These two genetically altered lab mice headlined their own 1995 spinoff after an Animaniacs segment.
clues.response: Who are Pinky and the Brain?

clues.clue: The zany Warner siblings were said to be locked in the water tower on this Burbank studio's lot.
Bruce Timm and Eric Radomski's 1992 series reinvented Gotham's Dark Knight for animation.
Harley Quinn was co-created for that 1992 series by writer Paul Dini and this animator-producer.
Steven Spielberg's Amblin produced Tiny Toon Adventures and this 1993 variety-cartoon successor.
Genndy Tartakovsky's 1996 series followed a boy genius hiding a lab from his sister Dee Dee.
Craig McCracken created this 1998 trio of sisters powered by 'Chemical X.'
McCracken's 2004 series centered on a foster home for abandoned imaginary companions.
clues.response: What is Foster's Home for Imaginary Friends?

clues.clue: The network's adult-oriented late-night programming block launched in 2001 under this name.
Pendleton Ward's 2010 series sent Finn and Jake adventuring across the Land of Ooo.
The duo who recorded the 'Friends' theme 'I'll Be There for You' went by this name.
The 'Fresh Prince' rap theme was performed by this star, partnered on records with DJ Jazzy Jeff.
The 'Game of Thrones' main title was composed by Ramin, whose surname is this.
This film-score composer, known for Tim Burton movies, wrote 'The Simpsons' main theme.
Lalo Schifrin wrote this 1966 spy series' theme in an unusual 5/4 time signature.

final.clue: In 1909 this company sparked the in-box-premium craze by offering a children's 'Funny Jungleland' picture book.
